title: AI Resume Analyzer
subtitle: AI-Powered Career Feedback Platform
summary: A full-stack resume analyzer built with Angular 19 and .NET 9 Web API that extracts resume text, sends it to Groq's llama-3.3-70b model, and returns structured career feedback.
features: Built a resume analyzer with Angular 19 and .NET 9 Web API; the backend calls Groq's LLM API with a crafted prompt and returns a summary, strengths, weaknesses, and improvements.
Added PDF upload support using PdfPig for server-side text extraction and designed the prompt to return JSON that maps directly to a C# model.
Containerized the .NET API with Docker and deployed it to Render, hosted Angular on Vercel, and automated redeployments on every push to main with GitHub Actions.

title: Order Processing Pipeline
subtitle: Event-Driven Microservices Workflow
summary: An event-driven order processing system where order placement publishes RabbitMQ messages consumed by independent Inventory and Email services, with live status updates pushed to Angular through SignalR.
features: Built an order workflow where placing an order publishes a RabbitMQ message consumed separately by Inventory and Email services, each focused on one responsibility.
Used MassTransit for RabbitMQ integration with retry logic to handle broker startup delays inside a Docker Compose environment.
Pushed real-time status updates like Stock Updated and Email Sent to the Angular frontend through SignalR without polling.
Containerized backend services plus RabbitMQ and SQL Server with Docker Compose while serving Angular locally with ng serve.

title: Employee API Deployment
subtitle: Cloud-Hosted REST API
summary: A RESTful Employee Management API built in ASP.NET Core 8 and deployed to Azure App Service with clean endpoint design, validation, and API documentation.
features: Created REST endpoints for retrieving, creating, and deleting employee records.
Added request validation and Swagger UI for easier API testing and documentation.
Deployed the application to Azure App Service for a live cloud-hosted demo environment.

title: Task Manager App
subtitle: Full-Stack Productivity App
summary: A full-stack task management application with an Angular frontend and ASP.NET Core backend, built around clean CRUD workflows and a structured REST API.
features: Built a full-stack task manager with task CRUD operations and a user-friendly workflow.
Implemented a clean REST API backend connected to SQL Server.
Added unit tests covering the API layer for more reliable backend behavior.

title: Contact Book
subtitle: Secure Contact Management
summary: A contact management application with secure JWT authentication, fast contact lookup, and a paginated Angular UI backed by ASP.NET Core APIs and SQL Server.
features: Implemented secure JWT login and protected API access.
Added paginated contact listing with search and filtering for quick navigation.
Connected the Angular frontend to a RESTful ASP.NET Core backend using SQL Server.
